claim: The PGI claim checker catches seed false-comfort patterns.
would_disconfirm: The false_comfort fixture returns zero blocking findings.
The clean fixture produces blocking findings without unsafe language.
measurement: Run uv test for test_pgi_claim_checker.py and run the checker on both fixtures.
review_window: Re-check after any edit to scripts/check_philosophical_claims.py or PGI claim fixtures.
action_if_disconfirmed: Mark PGI-1.02 DEGRADED and repair the checker or fixture.
authority_boundary: This predicate does not authorize action.
